problem id: 48ae04f6
category: bit_manipulation

rule: (SHL(4) XOR SHR(5)) AND ROT(5)

examples:
  11000001 -> 00010000
  00011011 -> 00100000
  11000111 -> 01110000
  10110101 -> 00010100
  00001101 -> 10000000
  11110111 -> 01110110
  10111101 -> 10010101
  11010110 -> 01000010
  01101011 -> 00100001
  11001000 -> 00000000

query: 01011001
predicted answer: 00000010
